title: T-016 — QA-011 hold detail page + hold_release_modal (prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-016 — QA-011 hold detail page + hold_release_modal

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-011 + QUA-101, §8.5 prototypes hold_detail + hold_release_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build `/quality/holds/:id` Server Component showing the hold detail (audit history, items, linked NCR/inspection) plus the HoldReleaseModal Client Component for release flow with EsignBlock primitive (T-012).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/app/quality/holds/[id]/page.tsx` reads getHoldDetail(id) (T-010); renders Card with metadata, item list, audit history list (last 50 quality_audit_log rows for record_id).
2. `apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/HoldReleaseModal.tsx` shadcn Dialog with Disposition Select, Release notes Textarea, embedded EsignBlock; submits to releaseQualityHold (T-007).
3. Role guard: only quality_lead (or prod_manager when SoD allows) sees the Release button.
4. 1:1 parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/holds-screens.jsx:164-286` (hold_detail) and `quality/modals.jsx:99-156` (hold_release_modal).

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/holds/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/HoldReleaseModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/__tests__/holdDetail.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/holds-screens.jsx [ref]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/holds-screens.jsx:164-286, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (header card + items table + audit history list + linked records sidebar in same regions/order), visuals (shadcn Card/Table/Badge primitives, signed banner uses Alert variant=success when released), and interaction (Release button visible only to quality_lead, opens HoldReleaseModal) — verified by RTL test plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given the HoldReleaseModal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:99-156, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (Disposition Select + Release notes Textarea + EsignBlock; footer Cancel/Sign in same order), visual parity (red-bordered destructive footer per MODAL-SCHEMA §4), and interaction parity (SoD warning copy when caller=created_by and priority=critical, Sign disabled until disposition!=Pending and notes>=10 chars and PIN ready) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist
3. Given a successful release flow with valid pin_proof, when releaseQualityHold returns ok, then the modal closes, the page revalidates, and the audit history shows a new SIGN row

pipeline_inputs.description: Hold detail page + Release modal (Cancel/Sign) with EsignBlock; 1:1 parity with hold_detail + hold_release_modal prototypes.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component renders hold metadata Card, items Table, audit history list (last 50 quality_audit_log rows). HoldReleaseModal: Disposition Select + Release notes Textarea (min 10 chars) + embedded EsignBlock (T-012); submits to releaseQualityHold (T-007). SoD warning banner shown when caller=created_by and priority=critical. Honor prototype translation notes: server-side hash, virtual-keypad PIN deferred, server-injected user/timestamp (no client clock).
out_of_scope: Do not implement quick-release inline button on holds list (§8.2 list action — covered by T-014)
Do not implement audit-trail PDF download (P2)
Do not implement override flow (delete-with-reason, T-061)
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/holds-screens.jsx:164-286, then it has parity on structure (header card + items table + audit history + linked records sidebar in same regions), visuals (shadcn Card/Table/Badge/Alert primitives only), and interaction (Release button visible only to quality_lead, opens HoldReleaseModal) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details

Given the HoldReleaseModal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:99-156, then it matches on structural parity (Disposition Select + Release notes Textarea + EsignBlock + Cancel/Sign footer in same order), visual parity (red-bordered destructive footer per MODAL-SCHEMA §4), and interaction parity (SoD warning when caller=created_by and priority=critical, Sign disabled until disposition!=Pending and notes>=10 chars and PIN ready) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist
Given a successful release with valid pin_proof, when releaseQualityHold returns ok, then the modal closes, the page revalidates, and the audit history list contains a new SIGN row
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/__tests__/holdDetail.test.tsx asserting structural regions, role-gated Release button, modal validation, audit history append
risk_red_lines: Do not show Release button to non-quality_lead callers
Do not allow client to compute or send signature_hash
Do not omit SoD warning when caller==created_by and priority==critical
